creator: e96sv@efd.lth.se
text:
On Sun, Mar 25, 2001 at 07:20:03AM -0800, Will Andrews wrote:
>  On Sun, Mar 25, 2001 at 11:20:22AM +0200, Sverre Valgeirsson wrote:
>  > Yes. I've used the program some, and not experienced any problems with it.
>  > Can you give me some details on what went wrong, so that I can recreate the problem?
>  
>  OK, when I connect to ftp.cerias.purdue.edu (and hit "anonymous login")
>  using the Quick Connect, it says "Error - KBear" "Unsupported action -
>  listDir".  I've put up an image that shows exactly what happens here:
>  
>  	http://www.physics.purdue.edu/~will/kbear.png
>  
>  and an updated shar which does the port "correctly" here:
>  
>  	http://www.physics.purdue.edu/~will/kbear.shar
>  
>  Let me know!  Please keep FreeBSD-gnats-submit on the Cc: line, as it
>  records our discussion.

Here is the newest version of the program. I've been using it a few weeks and it woked nicely
on 4.2-STABLE amd 4.3-RELEASE. Hope it works better than last time.

The shar file can be found further down in this mail or at: http://viking.dhs.org/kbear.sh

thanks
/sverre

---

# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	ftp/kbear
#	ftp/kbear/distinfo
#	ftp/kbear/Makefile
#	ftp/kbear/pkg-descr
#	ftp/kbear/pkg-plist
#	ftp/kbear/pkg-comment
#
echo c - ftp/kbear
mkdir -p ftp/kbear > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - ftp/kbear/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >ftp/kbear/distinfo << 'END-of-ftp/kbear/distinfo'
XMD5 (kbear-1.2.1.src.tar.bz2) = 5bb311d0f582803a7ffbcef5c8a12b5e
END-of-ftp/kbear/distinfo
echo x - ftp/kbear/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >ftp/kbear/Makefile << 'END-of-ftp/kbear/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:   kbear
X# Date created:        20 January 2001
X# Whom:                sverrir
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=      kbear
XPORTVERSION=   1.2.1
XCATEGORIES=    ftp kde
XMASTER_SITES= ${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR= ${PORTNAME}
XEXTRACT_SUFX=.src.tar.bz2
X
XMAINTAINER=    sverrir@hem.passagen.se
X
XUSE_KDELIBS_VER=2
XUSE_BZIP2= yes
XUSE_GMAKE=	yes
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XUSE_XLIB=	yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-ftp/kbear/Makefile
echo x - ftp/kbear/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >ftp/kbear/pkg-descr << 'END-of-ftp/kbear/pkg-descr'
XA very good drag-and-drop FTP client for KDE 2.
XTries to be as easy to use as possible.
X
XWWW: http://kbear.sourceforge.net
END-of-ftp/kbear/pkg-descr
echo x - ftp/kbear/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >ftp/kbear/pkg-plist << 'END-of-ftp/kbear/pkg-plist'
Xbin/kbear
Xshare/applnk/Internet/kbear.desktop
Xshare/apps/kbear/sitemanager
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/detailview_thumb.png
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/iconview_thumb.png
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/kbear-logo.png
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/kde2_closebutton.xpm
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/kde2_closebutton_menu.xpm
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/kde2_maxbutton.xpm
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/kde2_minbutton.xpm
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/kde2_restorebutton.xpm
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/kde2_undockbutton.xpm
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/kde_maxbutton.xpm
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/kde_minbutton.xpm
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/kde_restorebutton.xpm
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/kde_undockbutton.xpm
Xshare/apps/kbear/toolbar/wizard.png
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/kbear/common
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/kbear/index.docbook
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/kbear/sitemanager-snapshot.png
Xshare/doc/HTML/en/kbear/snapshot1.png
Xshare/icons/hicolor/16x16/apps/kbear.png
Xshare/icons/hicolor/32x32/apps/kbear.png
Xshare/icons/hicolor/48x48/apps/kbear.png
Xshare/icons/locolor/16x16/apps/kbear.png
Xshare/icons/locolor/32x32/apps/kbear.png
Xshare/icons/locolor/48x48/apps/kbear.png
Xshare/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/kbear.mo
Xshare/locale/es/LC_MESSAGES/kbear.mo
Xshare/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/kbear.mo
Xshare/locale/it/LC_MESSAGES/kbear.mo
Xshare/locale/ja/LC_MESSAGES/kbear.mo
Xshare/locale/nl/LC_MESSAGES/kbear.mo
Xshare/locale/pl/LC_MESSAGES/kbear.mo
Xshare/locale/pt_BR/LC_MESSAGES/kbear.mo
Xshare/locale/sv/LC_MESSAGES/kbear.mo
X@dirrm share/apps/kbear/toolbar
X@dirrm share/apps/kbear
X@dirrm share/doc/HTML/en/kbear
END-of-ftp/kbear/pkg-plist
echo x - ftp/kbear/pkg-comment
sed 's/^X//' >ftp/kbear/pkg-comment << 'END-of-ftp/kbear/pkg-comment'
XA graphical FTP client for KDE 2
END-of-ftp/kbear/pkg-comment
exit
